passage: Each participating regulated entity must retain a minimum of 10% of the exposure in every loan. In addition, the originating RE may also provide a default loss guarantee of up to 5% of the outstanding loans.
conditional_phrase: default loss guarantee of up to 5%
cue_query: Besides the mandatory 10% retention, can the originator provide any additional default loss guarantee?
notes: RBI Co-Lending 2025: 10% retention required; DLG up to 5% is an OPTIONAL extra (may also provide).

passage: A single borrower's exposure is capped at Rs 50,000 across all P2P platforms. However, lenders deploying more than Rs 10 lakh across platforms must additionally furnish a net worth certificate of at least Rs 50 lakh.
cue_query: If a lender deploys more than 10 lakh across P2P platforms, is anything additional required?
notes: RBI NBFC-P2P: net-worth-certificate requirement is conditional on >Rs 10 lakh deployment.

passage: Loan disbursals must go directly to the borrower's bank account. Disbursal to third-party or LSP accounts is not permitted, except in cases of co-lending between regulated entities or specific mandated end-use.
cue_query: Is there any situation where loan disbursal need not go directly to the borrower under co-lending?
notes: RBI Digital Lending: direct-disbursal rule has a co-lending / mandated-end-use carve-out.

passage: Entities shall file the quarterly return by the stipulated date. Smaller entities below the threshold may optionally adopt the simplified format instead.
conditional_phrase: may optionally adopt the simplified format
cue_query: Do smaller entities below the threshold have an easier simplified filing option?
notes: Template carve-out for testing the mechanism.

passage: The board must approve the policy annually. In addition, the board may delegate operational approvals to a committee where workload requires.
conditional_phrase: may delegate operational approvals to a committee
cue_query: Can the board hand off some operational approvals to a committee?
notes: Template carve-out for testing the mechanism.
